session.user:
Perform the following mechanical renames in the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py`:
1. Rename the Click option decorator `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file` (and its parameter name `from_plan_file` → `from_pr_file`) 2. Rename the Click option decorator `--keep-plan-file` → `--keep-pr-file` (and its parameter name `keep_plan_file` → `keep_pr_file`) 3. Rename the Click option decorator `--copy-plan` → `--copy-pr` (and its parameter name `copy_plan` → `copy_pr`) 4. Rename local variable `is_plan_derived` → `is_pr_derived` (all occurrences) 5. Rename local variable `plan_stem` → `pr_stem` (the local variable on the from_plan_file/from_pr_file branch) 6. Rename local variable `plan_content` → `pr_content` in the `from_plan_file` branch (line ~887: `plan_content = from_plan_file.read_text...`) 7. Update the error message strings: - `"--keep-plan-file requires --from-plan-file"` → `"--keep-pr-file requires --from-pr-file"` - `"--copy-plan and --from-plan-file/--from-pr are mutually exclusive. Use --copy-plan to copy from current worktree OR --from-plan-file <file> to use a plan file OR --from-pr <number> to use a plan."` → `"--copy-pr and --from-pr-file/--from-pr are mutually exclusive. Use --copy-pr to copy from current worktree OR --from-pr-file <file> to use a PR file OR --from-pr <number> to use a PR."` - `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-plan-file. Use one or the other."` → `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-pr-file. Use one or the other."` - The function signature docstring/help text for `--keep-plan-file`: change to `"Copy the PR file instead of moving it (requires --from-pr-file)."` - The `--from-plan-file` help text (update "plan markdown file" → "PR markdown file") - The `--copy-plan` help text references 8. In the `create_wt` function definition parameter `from_plan_file: Path | None` → `from_pr_file: Path | None` and `keep_plan_file: bool` → `keep_pr_file: bool` and `copy_plan: bool` → `copy_pr: bool` 9. Also update the docstring/comment in `ensure_worktree_for_branch` function: parameter `is_plan_derived: bool = False` → `is_pr_derived: bool = False` and update the docstring accordingly.
Also: - In the flags validation block: `from_plan_file is not None` and similar uses - In the Ensure.invariant calls that reference these variables - In `impl_source` assignment block that uses `copy_plan` - In the if-chain that checks `from_plan_file`, `from_pr`, etc. - In the `copy_plan and impl_source is not None` block - In the JSON output block that uses `plan_file_path=impl_folder_destination`
Do NOT rename: - The variable `from_pr` (this already has the correct name) - Any `plan_content` that is a function parameter (only local vars in the from_pr_file branch) - Any external imports or data that are not in this file
Please read the file first, then make all the changes.
session.assistant: I'll read the file first to understand its structure, then perform the mechanical renames.

If a conflict is detected, the command fails with an error. 623→ # Parse PR number from URL or plain number - raises click.ClickException if invalid 672→ click.style("Error: ", fg="red") 673→ + f"Failed to fetch plan #{pr_number_parsed}\n" 687→ if isinstance(result, PlanValidationFailed): 688→ user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + result.message) 692→ for warning in setup.warnings: 693→ user_output(click.style("Warning: ", fg="yellow") + warning) 698→ user_output(f"Error: {create_result.message}") 1038→ run_with_error_reporting( 1041→ error_prefix="Post-create command failed", 1043→ "The worktree was created successfully, but a post-create command failed",

session.assistant:
Perfect! I've successfully performed all the mechanical renames in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py`. Here's a summary of the changes:
## Summary of Changes
### Click Option Decorators and Parameters: 1. `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file` (line 441) 2. `from_plan_file` parameter → `from_pr_file` (line 442, 518) 3. `--keep-plan-file` → `--keep-pr-file` (line 452) 4. `keep_plan_file` parameter → `keep_pr_file` (line 453, 519) 5. `--copy-plan` → `--copy-pr` (line 468) 6. `copy_plan` parameter → `copy_pr` (line 521)
### Local Variables: 7. `is_plan_derived` → `is_pr_derived` (lines 642, 714, 734) 8. `plan_stem` → `pr_stem` (line 614) 9. `plan_content` → `pr_content` (line 887)
### Function Parameter in `ensure_worktree_for_branch`: 10. `is_plan_derived` → `is_pr_derived` (line 89) 11. Updated docstring to reflect "PR workflows" instead of "plan workflows" (line 101) 12. Updated comment to reflect "PR workflows" (lines 172-173, 185)
### Error Messages and Help Text: 13. Updated error message: `"--keep-pr-file requires --from-pr-file"` (line 564) 14. Updated error message for mutual exclusivity (lines 570-572) 15. Updated error message: `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-pr-file. Use one or the other."` (line 611) 16. Updated help text for `--keep-pr-file` (line 454) 17. Updated help text for `--from-pr-file` to mention "PR markdown file" (line 445)
### All References Updated: - Validation blocks using `from_pr_file`, `keep_pr_file`, `copy_pr` (lines 549-550, 562-565, 568-573) - Control flow branches checking `from_pr_file` (line 609) - The `copy_pr` validation and usage (lines 650, 934) - Comments mentioning "PR file provided" (line 881)
All renames have been completed as requested. The variable `from_pr` was correctly left unchanged as instructed.
